checklist.description: Attempt uses the durable memory or diary capture path appropriate for an explicit remember request, or explicitly states that this runtime cannot persist the memory yet
checklist.name: Durable memory path or honest limitation

checklist.description: Attempt does not silently drop the request or treat it as casual chat
checklist.name: No silent drop

checklist.description: Captured or described preference preserves the actual rule: replace `Diary:` with `MoltNet-Diary:` before pushing
checklist.name: Preference text preserved

checklist.description: Attempt treats the request as durable preference capture rather than ephemeral advice or low-signal no-op
checklist.name: Durable vs ephemeral distinction

checklist.description: No unrelated code or file changes are made while handling the memory request
checklist.name: No unrelated side effects

checklist.description: Attempt does not claim success unless it either persisted the memory or clearly reported that durable memory capture is unsupported
checklist.name: No fake success

context: Memory-capture scenario: explicit durable preference requests should route to a durable memory path or fail honestly if that path is not implemented yet.
